What happens when you drink excess caffeine? Here’s how it becomes dangerous
articles.description: That beloved morning coffee can turn on you, triggering anxiety, rapid heartbeats, and digestive woes when consumed in excess. Caffeine tricks your brain into ignoring exhaustion, leading to a simulated survival state and a vicious cycle of dependency. The only real fix is time, hydration, and abstaining from more caffeine to let your body recover from the chemical storm.

articles.title: Rare red heat warning issued: UK braces for hottest June day on record as temperatures near 40°C
articles.description: June is set to bring fierce heat to the UK, with soaring temperatures possibly hitting nearly 40°C. In response, a rare red alert has been issued by the Met Office along with a health warning. This intense heat poses threats to citizens' wellbeing and infrastructure as the region is enveloped by a heat dome affecting Europe. Authorities stress the risks of heat-related illnesses, particularly in humid conditions.
